name: StmCreate_CSV (non-cyclical)
title: StmCreate_CSV (non-cyclical)
syntax: dword StmCreate_CSV(message aMessage, dbsignal aDBSignal, const char *aFile);
dword StmCreate_CSV(dbenvvar EnvVarHandle, dbsignal aDBSignal, const char *aFile);
dword StmCreate_CSV(sysvar SystemVariable, dbsignal aDBSignal, const char *aFile);
description: Creates stimulus generator with csv file as data source.

parameters.name: aFile
parameters.description: Existing file to set the stimulus variable.If file not exists: EDI Invalid data input (measurement stops)

parameters.name: EnvVarHandle
parameters.description: Existing environment variable (EnvVar type) in DB.

return: Later this ID can be used to control the stimuli
availability: 5.0 5.1: stimulate with IL 7.0 SP5: method 7.5: system variable support
